title: spartina alterniflora var. pilosa
intro: Spartina alterniflora var. pilosa, also known as sea oat or beach grass, is a variety of coastal grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Spartina alterniflora var. pilosa include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting skin health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in salves and ointments for topical applications.
